name: Google Play Console MCP
description: Manage the full Google Play Store release lifecycle from your AI assistant — upload artifacts, create and promote releases across all tracks, manage testers, adjust rollout percentages, and fetch Android Vitals (crash rate, ANR rate, wakelock rate, wakeup rate).

tools.name: list_tracks
tools.description: List all available release tracks (internal, alpha, beta, production) with their current releases and country availability.

tools.name: get_track_info
tools.description: Get detailed info for a specific release track including release status, version codes, rollout percentage, and release notes.

tools.name: create_release
tools.description: Create a new release on a given track with specified version codes, release notes, and optional staged rollout percentage.

tools.name: update_release
tools.description: Update an existing release on a track — change rollout percentage, status, or release notes.

tools.name: promote_release
tools.description: Promote a release from one track to another (e.g. internal → alpha → beta → production) with an optional staged rollout.

tools.name: list_artifacts
tools.description: List all APKs and AABs (Android App Bundles) currently uploaded to the app, with their version codes and SHA hashes.

tools.name: upload_artifact
tools.description: Upload an APK or AAB file to Google Play and optionally assign it to a track in one step.

tools.name: upload_to_internal_sharing
tools.description: Upload an APK or AAB to Internal App Sharing for quick distribution to testers without going through a full release.

tools.name: get_testers
tools.description: Get the list of tester email addresses for a specific track.

tools.name: update_testers
tools.description: Add or replace the tester list for a specific track.

tools.name: get_crash_rate
tools.description: Fetch the user-perceived crash rate from the Play Developer Reporting API, optionally filtered by date range and broken down by version code.

tools.name: get_anr_rate
tools.description: Fetch the ANR (Application Not Responding) rate from the Play Developer Reporting API, optionally filtered by date range.

tools.name: get_vitals_summary
tools.description: Get a combined summary of crash rate and ANR rate vitals for a quick app health overview.

tools.name: get_wakelock_rate
tools.description: Fetch the stuck partial wakelock rate from the Play Developer Reporting API to detect battery drain issues.

tools.name: get_wakeup_rate
tools.description: Fetch the excessive wakeup rate from the Play Developer Reporting API to detect apps that wake the CPU too frequently.
